HF.description: Balanced, homogeneous ice-hockey broadcast clips. This checkpoint is specialized for the visually distinctive rink and sports-broadcast domain.
HF.profile_basis: Public Hockey Fight dataset description plus local project documentation.

dataset_notes.public_dataset: 1,000 clips: 500 fight and 500 non-fight hockey clips.
dataset_notes.limitations: A saturated domain-specific baseline; not evidence of broad real-world generalization.

NTU.description: Five-second windows generated from NTU CCTV-Fights source videos. Positives overlap annotated fight intervals; hard negatives come from non-fight intervals in the same videos.
NTU.profile_basis: Published NTU CCTV-Fights description plus the exact local conversion and source diagnostics used for this checkpoint.

dataset_notes.public_dataset: 1,000 fight-containing videos with temporal fight annotations and an official 500/250/250 video split.
dataset_notes.trained_distribution: 4,940 balanced five-second windows. Positive and hard-negative windows come from the same source videos.
dataset_notes.source_mix: Local diagnostics: CCTV 2,033; Mobile 2,830; Car 24; Other 49.
dataset_notes.limitations: Annotation boundaries and unlabeled violence can make some windows ambiguous.

RLVS.description: Balanced short real-world violence and non-violence clips collected from varied web footage. The trained split contains scene re-cuts and a motion-presence shortcut.
RLVS.profile_basis: Published RLVS descriptions plus local split-integrity and model documentation.

dataset_notes.public_dataset: 2,000 balanced clips: 1,000 violence and 1,000 non-violence videos.
dataset_notes.trained_distribution: Seeded balanced 80/10/10 split of diverse short web clips.
dataset_notes.limitations: Local audit found near-duplicate scene re-cuts and a motion-presence shortcut.
